---
title: "test_runecaster_audit_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_runecaster_audit_empire.py"
loc: 32
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.00
style_score: 3.74
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.13
---

## Intent
The `test_runecaster_audit_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestRuneCasterWarden, warden, test_scan_finds_missing_return_type, test_scan_finds_missing_arg_type, test_scan_ignores_complete_hints, test_scan_ignores_self. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestRuneCasterWarden, warden, test_scan_finds_missing_return_type, test_scan_finds_missing_arg_type, test_scan_ignores_complete_hints, test_scan_ignores_self. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.runecaster](file://src.sentinel.wardens.runecaster)

### Exports
- `TestRuneCasterWarden`
- `warden`
- `test_scan_finds_missing_return_type`
- `test_scan_finds_missing_arg_type`
- `test_scan_ignores_complete_hints`
- `test_scan_ignores_self`
